tasks.label: agentic-backend
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make run PORT=8000

tasks.label: agentic-backend-prod
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make rrun-prod PORT=8000

tasks.label: knowledge-flow-backend
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8111 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make run PORT=8111

tasks.label: knowledge-flow-backend-prod
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8111 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make rrun-prod PORT=8111

tasks.label: control-plane
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8222 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make run PORT=8222

tasks.label: control-plane-prod
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:8222 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make rrun-prod PORT=8222

tasks.label: kf-worker
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; make run-worker

tasks.label: kf-worker-prod
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; make run-worker-prod

tasks.label: frontend
args: set -m; _cleanup(){ kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null; }; trap _cleanup EXIT INT TERM EXIT INT TERM; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids; make run
